content:
From: Mete Polat <metepolat2000@gmail.com>

Hi everyone,

Not sure who is maintaining the GitHub Isabelle mirrors but would love to see mirror-afp-2025-2 there as well if possible.

Best,
Mete

From: Makarius <makarius@sketis.net>

On 22/06/2026 20:54, Mete Polat wrote:

Not sure who is maintaining the GitHub Isabelle mirrors but would love to see mirror-afp-2025-2 there as well if possible.

Better delete them.

People sometimes think they could browse actual Isabelle history, but it does
not quite work: the many internal references to Isabelle hg changesets are wrong.

Makarius

From: Lars Hupel <lars@hupel.info>

Hi Mete,

Not sure who is maintaining the GitHub Isabelle mirrors but would
love to see mirror-afp-2025-2 there as well if possible.
thanks for pointing it out; I have created it now (upload in progress).

I wasn't aware that afp-2025-2 existed, since the Isabelle website says
that 2025-1 and -2 use the same AFP.

Cheers
Lars
